scripts.deploy: npm run build && gcloud storage cp ./dist/assets/*.js $BUCKET/js/assets/ --cache-control='no-cache' --content-type='text/javascript; charset=utf-8' && gcloud storage cp ./dist/assets/*.css $BUCKET/js/assets/ --cache-control='no-cache' --content-type='text/css; charset=utf-8' && gcloud storage cp ./dist/index.html $BUCKET/index.$RELEASE.html --cache-control='no-cache' --content-type='text/html; charset=utf-8' && gcloud storage cp -r ./dist/static/* $BUCKET/static/
